results.rendered_html:
vikṣipta p. p.
1 Scattered, thrown about, dispersed, cast about.
2 Discarded, dismissed.
3 Sent, despatched.
4 Distracted, bewildered, agitated;  Māl. 9. 8. 
5 Refuted; (see kṣip with vi).
